html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • April 06, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

TRUMP'S GOLDEN SURGE SHAKES CRIMINAL KINGDOM!

Iron Fist Wu-Tang Still Rules, But Presidential Pretender Closes Gap

Sweet Mother of Molotovs! The golden-haired gladiator we warned you about last week has unleashed absolute pandemonium upon our blood-soaked streets! Donald Trump, that presidential predator with the platinum pompadour, seized a staggering 112 territories this week while conducting 97 separate raids – proving his meteoric rise ain't no flash in the pan, but a full-scale revolution!

Our Oriental overlord Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" still commands the criminal kingdom with 97 fresh conquests and a bone-chilling 113 raids, but for the first time in memory, another contender has out-muscled the master! The gap between these titans grows razor-thin as Trump's golden empire expands like wildfire through a moonshine warehouse!

Meanwhile, the immaculately murderous Sir Caprice pulled back from his usual savage pace, claiming a comparatively modest 59 territories – though our dapper dealer of death proved his surgical precision remains sharper than ever with devastating efficiency strikes!

But the week's most spectacular bloodbath belongs to the catastrophic collapse of URAL📀, who watched 61 precious territories evaporate like bootleg whiskey in a police raid! This sonic-named sultan suffered an absolutely biblical 70 separate raids, transforming his once-proud empire into little more than rubble and regret!

SPECIAL BULLETIN: TRUMP'S HEADQUARTERS HOLOCAUST!

Citizens, witness the rise of our golden-haired destroyer! Donald Trump personally stormed the fortified headquarters of berke (twice!), Just_Jenny, and Dzon – a quadruple conquest that sent shockwaves through every criminal boardroom in the city! Sir Caprice matched Trump's savagery blow-for-bloody-blow, obliterating the headquarters of bagusngrh22, Bilz, duytuong, rtg, and Kusuma in a five-day reign of terror! Even Wu-Tang joined the headquarters hunting party, crushing URAL📀's stronghold in a display of raw power that left no doubt about his iron grip on this city!

The hemorrhaging FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR continues his imperial death spiral, bleeding another 36 territories while enduring 38 merciless raids. Once the undisputed monarch of mayhem, this fallen Caesar now serves as little more than a cautionary tale whispered in speakeasy shadows!

Rising through the ranks like smoke through a chimney, Cokro emerged as this week's dark horse with 24 gleaming conquests, while the infamous GodFather claimed 20 fresh turfs with the methodical patience that built his legendary reputation!

Our beloved Vacation Brothers maintained their tropical expansion, though at a more leisurely poolside pace. Vacation Bob claimed 11 sun-kissed territories while brother Vacation Albert managed just 4 turfs – perhaps too distracted by Mai Tais to focus on mayhem!

But don't overlook Vacation Steve, that bronzed barbarian who proved his devastating potential by destroying 8 enemy headquarters without bothering to claim the ground – a feat of pure psychological warfare that left his enemies trembling in their Tommy gun holsters!

THIS WEEK'S TERRITORY SCORECARD

TOP CONQUERORS: Donald Trump +112, Wu-Tang +97, Sir Caprice +59, Cokro +24, GodFather +20

BIGGEST LOSERS: URAL📀 -61, Lakhhe -58, FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR -36

FRESH BLOOD: Welcome pratikthapw to our murderous metropolis!

POLICE BLOTTER

• Officer Kowalski reported a suspicious gathering of accountants near the docks – turned out to be Donald Trump's boys counting their weekly haul of $500 in cold cash from poor Ace Sabo Luffy Law!

• Downtown precinct received seventeen noise complaints about "excessive headquarters explosions" – Chief Murphy told complainants to "get used to it, it's spring cleaning season!"

• Local businessman inquired about purchasing "lightly used criminal territory" – was informed all sales are final and conducted exclusively through Tommy gun negotiations!
